content: {"cards": [{"name": "Steadfast Guardsman", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Human Soldier", "oracle_text": "", "flavor_text": "\"My watch begins at dawn and ends at dusk. Then it begins again.\"", "power": "2", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Vanilla creature testing restraint. 2/4 for 3 mana is reasonable stats for a white common creature, prioritizing defense over offense which fits white's philosophy. No abilities means it's purely about stats and mana efficiency."}, {"name": "Radiant Pegasus", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Pegasus", "oracle_text": "Flying", "flavor_text": "Its wings shimmer with divine light, carrying prayers to the heavens above.", "power": "1", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple keyword-only creature with flying, white's most common evergreen keyword. 1/2 flying for 2 mana is appropriate power level for common - slightly under-statted due to evasion ability."}, {"name": "Divine Judgment", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Exile target creature with power 4 or greater.", "flavor_text": "\"The mighty fall furthest when their foundations crumble.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "White's exile-based removal at uncommon with a condition. Targets high-power creatures, fitting white's philosophy of humbling the proud and powerful. Conditional removal keeps it balanced for uncommon."}, {"name": "Scholarly Insight", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Draw a card. Scry 1.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge flows to those who seek it with an open mind.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Classic blue cantrip combining card draw with scry. Draw a card replaces itself, and scry 1 provides minor card selection. This is appropriately costed at 2 mana for common, giving blue its signature card advantage."}, {"name": "Arcane Refutation", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Counter target spell. If that spell had mana value 4 or greater, draw a card.", "flavor_text": "\"Your grand designs are but parlor tricks to a true master.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Counterspell variant with upside against expensive spells. The card draw reward for countering high-cost spells makes it more interesting than basic counterspells, while maintaining blue's control identity. Uncommon complexity with conditional bonus."}]}
